inputs.fcf_source: FY2024 excess revenues over expenses $2,134,121 / 141,666 shares (2025-12-31 annual); excludes FY2025 one-time land sales and Dry Lake cattle charges
inputs.normalization_note: Tax-basis cash accounting; FY2025 included $1.92M land-sale gains and $1.98M Dry Lake Farm cattle depreciation. Lawrence uses FY2024 run-rate owner cash.

nav_overlay.overlay_rationale: Land at average tax cost (~$13/acre on 239k surface acres); mineral rights assigned zero to Aztec Minerals LLC; renewable lease income is majority of revenue.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: FY2025 annual Note 1: grazing land at average cost; no value assigned to mineral rights transferred to Minerals

segments_or_options.nav_assumption: [Assumption] $1,600/acre mark on consolidated AZ acreage net of overlap with lease cash flows

options.label: Parcel sales and area-plan development
options.base_terminal_rationale: FY2025 recognized $721k land sales plus installment gains; Navajo County Aztec Area Plan

optionality_gate.notes: Price ~1.9x Marvin overlay NAV ~$1,180/sh; Lawrence owner-cash path deeply negative at $2,287.

bear.notes: Renewable development cancellations; litigation costs rise; related-party concentration

base.notes: Normalized owner cash $15.06/sh; renewable operations term ramp

lines.label: Renewable and grazing lease run-rate capitalized
Surface acreage above tax carrying value

bull.notes: Multiple renewable projects reach operations; land sales accelerate; water rights clarified

growth_explanation.mechanism: Renewable energy leases transitioning from development to 25-35 year operations terms; partial offset from grazing and access income.
growth_explanation.stress: Lessees may cancel during development without refund; concentration in renewable rent.

base.label: Starting owner cash per share
